untranslatable_reason: The signal requires identification of: (1) a support zone established by prior congestion (no congestion/clustering indicator available), (2) detection of a black candle within a specific group of 5 surrounding candles (no multi-bar pattern detection in available indicators), and (3) price rising above the top of candle shadows for a group of 5 candles (no aggregate wick-height comparison available). The pivot level (s1) is used as a proxy for support, but true support zone detection from prior congestion cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using: black candle body < 0 (close < open), price above pivot support (close > s1), and exit when reversal occurs (close < prev_close). This is a simplified interpretation as the pattern requires contextual support zone analysis and multi-bar shadow comparison that cannot be fully expressed in the available indicator set.
